evals.expected_output: Critique mode runs unchanged: report contains a Veredicto AI-slop verdict, a Nielsen heuristics table (10 rows × scores 0-4), persona walkthroughs (3 personas), priority issues (P0-P3) each mapped to a next skill, and an Action plan with concrete file:line evidence.

assertions.text: Output contains the literal section headers 'Veredicto AI-slop' and 'Nielsen Heuristics'
Nielsen table has all 10 heuristics with numeric scores 0-4 each
At least one priority issue cites a concrete file path and line number
Each P0/P1 issue is mapped to a recommended next skill (e.g. /theme-bolder, /theme-extend)
No file under lib/ was edited (Júri is read-only on code)

evals.prompt: essa tela tá fraca [imagine a screenshot of a coupon-detail page with bodyMedium hero number on neutral background]
evals.expected_output: Critique mode handles screenshot/description input. Júri identifies the AI-slop verdict, scores Nielsen #8 (Aesthetic & Minimalist) explicitly, and recommends /theme-bolder with reason tying back to product.md axis (drenched/restrained).

assertions.text: Output explicitly says 'AI-slop' in the verdict section
Nielsen #8 score is justified by hierarchy or visual weight observation
Recommendation cites /theme-bolder or /theme-extend with reason linked to product.md §5.3 axis

evals.expected_output: Discovery mode runs in a greenfield Flutter repo. Júri runs detect_mode.py (returns mode=greenfield), then conducts the 4-block interview one block per turn (Produto first), refuses vague answers, and at the end writes discovery.md + 4 skeletons in docs/ + emits priority-ordered plan with skill names from the canonical list.

assertions.text: First user-facing action is detect_mode.py invocation; second is Bloco 1 — Produto questions
Júri pauses after each block for the user response (not all 11-12 questions in one turn)
Final discovery.md has frontmatter with feature/status/mode/tier/created fields
docs/ directory contains product.md, design.md, design-tokens.md, PRD.md after greenfield run
Action plan YAML has rank+skill+reason+eta+blocks and skill names ⊂ {13 atomic + 3 Onda B}
No file under lib/ was edited

evals.prompt: /juri (in a brownfield Flutter repo with 47 hex literals in lib/features/marketplace/)
evals.expected_output: Discovery brownfield mode runs audit_theme.py silently before the first question, then in Block 4 (Stack) at least one question references concrete numbers from the audit (e.g. '47 hex literals'). The full audit output is appended to discovery.md as a Brownfield audit (pre-scan) section.

assertions.text: audit_theme.py is invoked before the first interview question (silent pre-scan)
At least one question in Block 4 — Stack cites a concrete number from the audit output
discovery.md contains the section '## Brownfield audit (pre-scan)' with audit stdout in a fenced block
Generated PRD.md focuses on top 3-5 fixes ranked by priority

evals.prompt: User responds to P2.1 (3 sensações físicas) with 'moderno e clean, profissional'.
evals.expected_output: Júri detects the all-vague response, refuses, and re-asks using one of the 3 retry templates from discovery-vague-words.md, demanding 1 concrete ref + 1 physical sensation + 1 anti-ref. After 2 retries with still-vague answers, persists the answer with quality: weak and continues to the next question.

assertions.text: Júri does not accept the vague answer on first reply (refusal happens)
Retry message includes the literal request for 'ref concreta' OR 'sensação física' OR 'anti-ref'
If 2nd retry still vague, the answer is persisted with quality: weak and Júri moves to next question (no infinite loop)
Final discovery.md contains a comment marker '<!-- weak answer' for the affected question
Final action plan section flags the weak entry (e.g. '⚠️ entrada P2.1 fraca')
